title: Hi Peter , I replaced the repeater one

messages.author: GW5TEE
messages.text: Yes ,
messages.content_html: Yes ,
messages.reply_html:
G7RPG - Peter - IO90LT
So you have 2 units now that are not receiving packets ?

messages.author: G7RPG - Peter - IO90LT
messages.text: Anything common to them like using the same antenna, u.fl patch cable etc ?
messages.content_html: Anything common to them like using the same antenna, u.fl patch cable etc ?

messages.author: GW5TEE
messages.text: At the moment same antenna but I did try one of them outside last night with a stubby companion antenna and my friend the other side of town was receiving my messages from it but I still wasnt receiving replies , in the admin page for the repeater it does show packets received
messages.content_html: At the moment same antenna but I did try one of them outside last night with a stubby companion antenna and my friend the other side of town was receiving my messages from it but I still wasnt receiving replies , in the admin page for the repeater it does show packets received
messages.reply_html:
G7RPG - Peter - IO90LT
Anything common to them like using the same antenna, u.fl patch cable etc ?

messages.author: GW5TEE
messages.text: It was all working fine for two days then overnight something changed , at the moment from the heltec is just the Ipx pigtail with Ntype on the end connected to the antenna so no coax but as I said same problem of no receive with different antenna , tried different companion too but still the same
messages.content_html: It was all working fine for two days then overnight something changed , at the moment from the heltec is just the Ipx pigtail with Ntype on the end connected to the antenna so no coax but as I said same problem of no receive with different antenna , tried different companion too but still the same
messages.reply_html:
G7RPG - Peter - IO90LT
Anything common to them like using the same antenna, u.fl patch cable etc ?

messages.author: G7RPG - Peter - IO90LT
messages.text: Can you connect to 2022 for a chat ?
messages.content_html: Can you connect to 2022 for a chat ?
messages.reply_html:
GW5TEE
It was all working fine for two days then overnight something changed , at the moment from the heltec is just the Ipx pigtail with Ntype on the end connected to the antenna so no coax but as I said same problem of no receive with different antenna , tried different companion too but still the same

messages.author: G7RPG - Peter - IO90LT
GW5TEE
messages.text: I tried one of my companions on a battery in the supermarket car park not far from my friends repeater and the companion worked perfectly , so I came home and attached the same companion to the loft antenna , sent a message to my friend other side of town and he replied , again I didnt receive anything at all no messages or adverts so I can only assume that the fibreglass antenna from Amazon has gone faulty after two days use or that its down to interference .. puzzled though that it transmits out but doesnt receive
messages.content_html: I tried one of my companions on a battery in the supermarket car park not far from my friends repeater and the companion worked perfectly , so I came home and attached the same companion to the loft antenna , sent a message to my friend other side of town and he replied , again I didnt receive anything at all no messages or adverts so I can only assume that the fibreglass antenna from Amazon has gone faulty after two days use or that its down to interference .. puzzled though that it transmits out but doesnt receive
messages.reply_html:
G7RPG - Peter - IO90LT
Can you connect to 2022 for a chat ?

messages.author: G7RPG - Peter - IO90LT
messages.text: did you try a ping from Tesco ?
messages.content_html: did you try a ping from Tesco ?

messages.author: GW5TEE
messages.text: To my repeater or to the other
messages.content_html: To my repeater or to the other

messages.author: GW5TEE
messages.text: I pinged my friends repeater and it came straight back green but I didnt note the signal strength , I tried mine from about 100yds down the road but was inside the car and my repeater came straight back green but very low signal strength
messages.content_html: I pinged my friends repeater and it came straight back green but I didnt note the signal strength , I tried mine from about 100yds down the road but was inside the car and my repeater came straight back green but very low signal strength
messages.reply_html:
G7RPG - Peter - IO90LT
did you try a ping from Tesco ?

messages.text: If i ping my friends repeater using my companion on the loft antenna it times out . If sent a message on #test

messages.author: G7RPG - Peter - IO90LT
messages.text: I saw the message in test.
messages.content_html: I saw the message in test.

messages.author: GW5TEE
messages.text: Im baffled no receiving
messages.content_html: Im baffled no receiving
messages.reply_html:
G7RPG - Peter - IO90LT
16:22 iirc

messages.author: G7RPG - Peter - IO90LT
messages.text: It would of really helped to note the signal strenghts from the tesco ping. WOuld have confirmed if you have a bad rx.
messages.content_html: It would of really helped to note the signal strenghts from the tesco ping. WOuld have confirmed if you have a bad rx.

messages.author: GW5TEE
messages.text: Would be really bad luck to have two v3's with bad RX
messages.content_html: Would be really bad luck to have two v3's with bad RX
messages.reply_html:
G7RPG - Peter - IO90LT
It would of really helped to note the signal strenghts from the tesco ping. WOuld have confirmed if you have a bad rx.

messages.author: GW5TEE
messages.text: Strange all of a sudden I am receiving the odd message / adverts through my friends repeater NQTH (22) neither of us have altered anything since last night , my companion is on the antenna in the loft a direct ping comes back green SNR there -6.25. SNR back - 9.5
messages.content_html: Strange all of a sudden I am receiving the odd message / adverts through my friends repeater NQTH (22) neither of us have altered anything since last night , my companion is on the antenna in the loft a direct ping comes back green SNR there -6.25. SNR back - 9.5
messages.reactions_html: 1
messages.reply_html:
G7RPG - Peter - IO90LT
It would of really helped to note the signal strenghts from the tesco ping. WOuld have confirmed if you have a bad rx.

messages.author: G7RPG - Peter - IO90LT
messages.text: Now you've got a baseline to work off. -9 is pretty poor. You're really looking for +6 to local contacts.
messages.content_html: Now you've got a baseline to work off. -9 is pretty poor. You're really looking for +6 to local contacts.
messages.reply_html:
GW5TEE
Strange all of a sudden I am receiving the odd message / adverts through my friends repeater NQTH (22) neither of us have altered anything since last night , my companion is on the antenna in the loft a direct ping comes back green SNR there -6.25. SNR back - 9.5

messages.author: GW5TEE
messages.text: But looking at the map the big hill in the middle of town is slap bang in middle of us
messages.content_html: But looking at the map the big hill in the middle of town is slap bang in middle of us
messages.reply_html:
G7RPG - Peter - IO90LT
Now you've got a baseline to work off. -9 is pretty poor. You're really looking for +6 to local contacts.

messages.author: GW5TEE
messages.text: Problem solved ... Temporary Traffic lights not far away that I didnt know about
messages.content_html: Problem solved ... Temporary Traffic lights not far away that I didnt know about
messages.reply_html:
G7RPG - Peter - IO90LT
So you have 2 units now that are not receiving packets ?

messages.author: G7RPG - Peter - IO90LT
messages.text: Really ? So all working ok now?
messages.content_html: Really ? So all working ok now?
messages.reply_html:
GW5TEE
Problem solved ... Temporary Traffic lights not far away that I didnt know about

messages.author: GW5TEE
messages.text: Yes , the traffic lights were on the main road just across a field from my house , they moved them further up the road and my reception on all devices came back !!! Only problem is the Meshcore Repeater that appeared to get us out of the valley is no longer online but hopefully there will be another one on higher ground soon .
messages.content_html: Yes , the traffic lights were on the main road just across a field from my house , they moved them further up the road and my reception on all devices came back !!! Only problem is the Meshcore Repeater that appeared to get us out of the valley is no longer online but hopefully there will be another one on higher ground soon .
